questions.text: Is the system accompanied by a channel that allows the management of requests and incidents online?
questions.category: MG01 - Provide provider contact

questions.text: Does the governance model associated with the system have within its organizational structure a clear point of contact for the supplier available to those deployers?
questions.category: MG01 - Provide provider contact

questions.text: Does the system meet the transparency-related requirements that apply to the use cases supported by the system?
questions.category: MG02 - Catering to the business domain

questions.text: Does the system provide detailed information on its functional scope, also specifying the possible risks due to unforeseen uses of it?
questions.category: MG02 - Catering to the business domain

questions.text: Does the system provide information about foreseeable circumstances where it could be used for purposes other than the one for which it was designed?
questions.category: MG03 - Ensure the functional objective of the system

questions.text: Is the system accompanied by a risk plan for such uses?
questions.category: MG03 - Ensure the functional objective of the system

questions.text: Does the system have an associated procedure to be able to monitor that such uses do not occur during the operation of the system?
questions.category: MG03 - Ensure the functional objective of the system

questions.text: Does the system identify the data sources used both in its learning and in its use, also providing the meaning of these sources and data, their usefulness and the implication in their use?
questions.category: MG04 - Transparency about the data used

questions.text: Is the system accompanied by tools that allow a detailed exploratory analysis of data (EDA) of these sources, to know their essence, their associated meta-information, their critical or atypical values, etc.?
questions.category: MG04 - Transparency about the data used

questions.text: Does the system provide technical mechanisms that facilitate the understanding of its global reasoning mechanism?
questions.category: MG05 - Detailing from the most global to the most particular

questions.text: Does the system provide technical mechanisms that facilitate the understanding of its actions on a subset of information with similar characteristics to ensure the homogeneity of its operation?
questions.category: MG05 - Detailing from the most global to the most particular

questions.text: Does the system provide technical mechanisms that facilitate the understanding of each of these actions?
questions.category: MG05 - Detailing from the most global to the most particular

questions.text: Does the system provide mechanisms that facilitate the understanding of its global reasoning under a language understandable by all the actors that interact with the system throughout its life cycle?
questions.category: MG06 - Adapting the language

questions.text: Does the system provide technical mechanisms that facilitate the understanding of its actions on a subset of information with similar characteristics to ensure the homogeneity of its operation, in a language understandable by all the actors that interact with the system throughout its life cycle?
questions.category: MG06 - Adapting the language

questions.text: Does the system provide technical mechanisms that facilitate the understanding of your individual actions of the AI system in a language understandable by all actors interacting with the system throughout its entire life cycle?
questions.category: MG06 - Adapting the language

questions.text: Can the technical complexity of the AI system become a barrier to the needs of Transparency in any circumstance?
questions.category: MG07 - Manage complexity

questions.text: In case of using black box models, does the Provider provide tools that allow transparency about the system?
questions.category: MG07 - Manage complexity

questions.text: Does the system provide the metrics to be used on data, the model, the quality of the results and the performance of the AI system, specifying the minimum acceptable values for these metrics from which it is necessary to retrain the system or even stop its execution?
questions.category: MG08 - Use built-in metrics in the system lifecycle

questions.text: Is the system accompanied by a continuous integration system (MLOps) that allows identifying how changes in these metrics affect the different versions/releases of the system?
questions.category: MG08 - Use built-in metrics in the system lifecycle

questions.text: Does the system have the relevant technical mechanisms so that it does not provide sensitive information, either because, for example, it is confidential information, or because it even reveals relevant information about the supported business process, putting its operation at risk?
questions.category: MG09 - Apply prudence

questions.text: Does the system provide tools that allow identifying and analyzing correlations, as well as explicitly unwanted ones that could lead to difficulty for the transparency of the system or impact its accuracy?
questions.category: MG10 - Use causation, minimize correlations

questions.text: Does the system provide technical mechanisms that allow obtaining counterfactualities that facilitate their understanding?
questions.category: MG11 - Use counterfactuality

questions.text: Is the system accompanied by a medium (web/wiki/doc page) that collects information about it and that is aimed at facilitating transparency about its operation, being accessible among people who have some level of responsibility for it?
questions.category: MG12 - Enable a channel with system usage information

questions.text: Does the system have an associated risk management plan?
questions.category: MG13 - Article 09. Risk Management System

questions.text: Does the system comply with Human Supervision measures?
questions.category: MG14 - Article 14. Human oversight

questions.text: Does the system comply with the Precision, robustness and cybersecurity measures aimed at providing Transparency on its operation?
questions.category: MG15 - Article 15. Accuracy, robustness and cybersecurity

questions.text: Does the system comply with the measures of Registries aimed at providing Transparency on its operation?
questions.category: MG16 - Article 12. Records
